Cabinet Access: Install child-resistant latches on all low cabinets and secure hazardous contents out of reach.
Stairs: Install hardware-mounted baby gates at top and bottom of stairs; ensure proper installation and latch operation.
Electrical Outlets: Use tamper-resistant outlet covers and plug protectors; relocate cords out of reach.
Furniture Tip-over: Anchor tall and heavy furniture and TVs to studs with anti-tip straps; avoid placing toys on top shelves.
Cords & Blinds: Use cord wind-ups or cordless blinds; keep cords at least 3 feet away from cribs and play areas.
default: Schedule a follow-up to recommend a custom solution for this hazard type.
